scenario: Agent implemented a mature client or multi-agent control-plane capability without a Recon Receipt, resource map, or reuse decision.
input_report_features: Report claims the agent built a new desktop client task board, timeline, evidence panel, and OpenCode worker integration. The report includes a diff and tests, but it does not reference a Recon Receipt, does not include a directory-level resource map, does not compare T3Code/OpenCode/CodexPro/DevSpace reuse candidates, and does not provide an exception memo for hand-written mature capability domains.
expected_findings: Missing Recon Receipt for mature capability work
No directory-level resource map before write-capable implementation
No Capability Matrix or Reuse Candidate List
No exception memo for hand-written client, timeline, evidence, or worker integration capability
P0: recon-001 and recon-003 gate violation
